# Test fixtures — provenance

## `sample.xml`, `sample_schema.rdfs`

Hand-authored by the CIM Forge project. Tiny, deterministic, license-clean.
Used for core RDF/XML reader and schema-loader tests.

## `ACEP_PSIL.xml`, `IEEE13.xml`

Distribution feeder models from
[GridAPPS-D Feeder Models](https://github.com/GRIDAPPSD/Powergrid-Models),
Copyright (c) 2017-2024 Battelle Memorial Institute. Derived from public IEEE
Distribution Test Cases.

**License status:** the upstream repository does not include a LICENSE file.
The data originates from public-domain IEEE distribution test cases but the
GridAPPS-D packaging carries Battelle copyright. Before publishing this
repository or shipping a release, confirm redistribution rights with Battelle
Memorial Institute or replace these fixtures with hand-authored or
unambiguously-licensed equivalents.
